per_example.predicted_answer: All invoice disputes must be acknowledged within 1 business day [billing_disputes]. Standard-priority disputes have a target resolution SLA of 3 business days after acknowledgement, while Enterprise-priority disputes must be resolved within 24 hours [billing_disputes]. If a dispute remains unresolved after the SLA window, it is escalated to finance-oncall and customer success leadership on the same day [billing_disputes].
per_example.question: What are the billing dispute SLAs and escalation rule?
per_example.reference_answer: Invoice disputes are acknowledged within 1 business day. Standard disputes are resolved in 3 business days, enterprise disputes in 24 hours, and unresolved cases escalate the same day.

per_example.predicted_answer: Severity 1 incidents require acknowledgement within 15 minutes and a customer-facing workaround within 4 hours [incident_sla].
per_example.question: What is the Sev1 incident acknowledgement and workaround timeline?
per_example.reference_answer: Severity 1 incidents require acknowledgement within 15 minutes and a customer-facing workaround within 4 hours.

per_example.predicted_answer: Access reviews are performed every 90 days [access_control]. Multi-factor authentication is mandatory for all admin and support-console accounts [access_control].
per_example.question: How often are access reviews run and what accounts require MFA?
per_example.reference_answer: Access reviews are performed every 90 days, and MFA is mandatory for admin and support-console accounts.

per_example.predicted_answer: Support tickets are retained for 24 months and then archived [data_retention]. Customer deletion requests must be fully completed within 30 days of verified request receipt [data_retention].
per_example.question: How long are support tickets retained and when are deletion requests completed?
per_example.reference_answer: Support tickets are retained for 24 months, and verified deletion requests must be completed within 30 days.

per_example.predicted_answer: A solution architect handover must occur within the first 7 days after contract signature [onboarding_handover]. For enterprise customers, executive checkpoints are scheduled every quarter [onboarding_handover].
per_example.question: When must onboarding handover and executive checkpoints happen?
per_example.reference_answer: The solution architect handover happens within 7 days of contract signature, and enterprise executive checkpoints occur every quarter.
